description_for_human: Constitutional geoscience platform for petroleum exploration. Query seismic data, evaluate prospects, calculate petrophysics, and access geological databases with 13-floor constitutional governance.
description_for_model: GEOX Earth Witness is a constitutional geoscience MCP platform. Use this to: (1) Query Malay Basin petroleum data, (2) Load and interpret seismic lines, (3) Evaluate prospects with tri-witness consensus, (4) Calculate water saturation using Archie/Simandoux/Indonesia models, (5) Query Macrostrat geological database. All operations pass through F1-F13 constitutional floors including F2 Truth (evidence grounding), F7 Humility (confidence caps), and F13 Sovereign (human override).

functions.name: geox_system_health
functions.description: Check GEOX system health and constitutional status. Returns version, seal status, and all F1-F13 floor states. Use this first to verify system readiness.

functions.name: geox_query_malay_basin
functions.description: Query the Malay Basin petroleum exploration pilot dataset. Get statistics, well information, or structural interpretation data. All data includes confidence levels.

functions.name: geox_load_seismic
functions.description: Load seismic line data for visualization and interpretation. Requires line ID and survey name. Returns data quality metrics.

functions.name: geox_analyze_structure
functions.description: Generate structural interpretation candidates from seismic or well data. Uses inverse modelling constraints. Returns multiple hypotheses with confidence scores (F7 Humility enforced).

functions.name: geox_evaluate_prospect
functions.description: Evaluate petroleum prospect viability using tri-witness consensus (F3). Returns risk matrix and recommendation. May trigger 888_HOLD for high-confidence evaluations (F13).

functions.name: geox_compute_saturation
functions.description: Calculate water saturation (Sw) using Archie, Simandoux, or Indonesia models with Monte Carlo uncertainty propagation. F7 Humility: confidence capped at 0.90.

functions.name: geox_query_geology
functions.description: Query Macrostrat geological database for regional stratigraphy, lithology, and age data. Data cited per F2 Truth requirements.
